entry.title: New: RES25-003 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
REAFFIRMING THE CITY POLICY, AS SET FORTH IN RESOLUTION 03-09, FD1, ADOPTED ON APRIL 16, 2003, THAT MUNICIPAL SOLID WASTE LANDFILLS SHOULD NOT BE LOCATED IN PROXIMITY TO THE CITY’S UNDERGROUND DRINKING WATER SOURCES.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution as amended were adopted.

View on the council site
